identity: Elven female shadow dancer, short choppy black hair swept to one side, sharp violet eyes, very pale porcelain skin with faint dark shadow-swirl tattoos curling up the arms and neck, pointed elf ears, lithe nimble build.
outfit: Black silk wrapped outfit with dark-violet trim, bare midriff, long silk sleeves ending in fingerless wraps, a trailing silk sash-belt, soft silent silk slippers. A cowl of shadow-silk around the shoulders (not a hood).
weapons: A single curved black-blade shadow scimitar in the right hand, wisps of dark-violet shadow trailing from the blade.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-forward-pirouette with scimitar slashed forward, shadow wisps trailing. Silk sash whipping.
spellStyle: East-facing. Scimitar held low, free hand raised with a cloud of dark-violet shadow swirling upward from the fingertips.
blockStyle: East-facing. Scimitar held vertically in front, free hand palm-up, a translucent dark-violet shadow ribbon spiraling as a guard.
koStyle: East-facing, collapsed on one knee, scimitar fallen beside her, silk sash splayed, shadow wisps fading.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), lithe poised idle. Scimitar held tip-down in the right hand, left arm raised in a dancer's pose. Shadow wisps around the feet.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Short choppy black hair swept aside, violet eyes, shadow-swirl tattoos on neck and arms, black silk wrap visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Elven female shadow dancer, short choppy black hair swept to one side, sharp violet eyes, very pale porcelain skin with faint dark shadow-swirl tattoos curling up the arms and neck, pointed elf ears, lithe nimble build.

OUTFIT: Black silk wrapped outfit with dark-violet trim, bare midriff, long silk sleeves ending in fingerless wraps, a trailing silk sash-belt, soft silent silk slippers. A cowl of shadow-silk around the shoulders (not a hood).

WEAPONS: A single curved black-blade shadow scimitar in the right hand, wisps of dark-violet shadow trailing from the blade.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Elven female shadow dancer, short choppy black hair swept to one side, sharp violet eyes, very pale porcelain skin with faint dark shadow-swirl tattoos curling up the arms and neck, pointed elf ears, lithe nimble build.

OUTFIT: Black silk wrapped outfit with dark-violet trim, bare midriff, long silk sleeves ending in fingerless wraps, a trailing silk sash-belt, soft silent silk slippers. A cowl of shadow-silk around the shoulders (not a hood).

WEAPONS: A single curved black-blade shadow scimitar in the right hand, wisps of dark-violet shadow trailing from the blade.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Short choppy black hair swept aside, violet eyes, shadow-swirl tattoos on neck and arms, black silk wrap visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
